Dt. be plenty of riches for him, by the
blessing ofUniversal Mother. He will
live happily. His 48th year will be a tough period and if he will outlive that
age he will have a full and long life. He will be married to a good girl in his
21st year or 27th year. She will live happily with her husband though what
ever the husband will earn will be squandered away by him.
